purpose: Canonical frame-level pose fairness rerun for mapped gripper TCP rows.

commands.panda_true: uv run python -m ddird.experiments.run_eval_baselines --data data/libero_ee_trajectories_armforge --outputs outputs/sourcebase_canonical_pose_it80/panda_true --robots panda_true --max-waypoints-per-trajectory 80 --max-iters 80 --num-workers 16 --base-pose-mode source --evaluation-mode pose --orientation-format rotvec --orientation-tolerance 0.10 --tool-frame-mapping canonical_tool
commands.xarm6_true: uv run --extra mujoco python -m ddird.experiments.run_eval_mjcf_robot --mjcf outputs/generated_models/xarm6_true/xarm6_true.xml --robot-name xarm6_true --base-body link_base --target-site link_tcp --target-body link6 --data data/libero_ee_trajectories_armforge --outputs outputs/sourcebase_canonical_pose_it80/xarm6_true --max-waypoints-per-trajectory 80 --max-iters 80 --num-workers 16 --base-pose-mode source --evaluation-mode pose --orientation-format rotvec --orientation-tolerance 0.10 --tool-frame-mapping canonical_tool
commands.ur5e_true_robotiq2f85_tcp_proxy: uv run --extra mujoco python -m ddird.experiments.run_eval_mjcf_robot --mjcf outputs/generated_models/ur5e_robotiq2f85_tcp_proxy/ur5e_true_robotiq2f85_tcp_proxy.xml --robot-name ur5e_true_robotiq2f85_tcp_proxy --base-body base --target-site ur5e_robotiq2f85_tcp --target-body wrist_3_link --data data/libero_ee_trajectories_armforge --outputs outputs/sourcebase_canonical_pose_it80/ur5e_true_robotiq2f85_tcp_proxy --max-waypoints-per-trajectory 80 --max-iters 80 --num-workers 16 --base-pose-mode source --evaluation-mode pose --orientation-format rotvec --orientation-tolerance 0.10 --tool-frame-mapping canonical_tool

tool_frame.semantics: LIBERO source Panda gripper/eef kinematic chain is included up to the recorded gripper site.

canonical_frame.name: parallel_jaw_pinch_tcp
canonical_frame.y_axis: finger opening/closing direction between left and right jaws
canonical_frame.z_axis: tool approach direction from palm/wrist toward the pinch point

tool_frame_mapping.rationale: LIBERO ee_ori is recorded at the Panda gripper0_grip_site; that site is the source canonical parallel-jaw TCP frame.

tool_frame.semantics: Official xArm gripper TCP offset is included; detailed gripper geometry and actuation are not modeled.

canonical_frame.name: parallel_jaw_pinch_tcp
canonical_frame.y_axis: finger opening/closing direction between left and right jaws
canonical_frame.z_axis: tool approach direction from palm/wrist toward the pinch point

tool_frame_mapping.rationale: Official xArm gripper joint_tcp has rpy=0, +Z offset to the TCP, and symmetric finger structure along +/-Y, matching the canonical parallel-jaw axes. The benchmark model still includes only the TCP offset, not full gripper geometry.

tool_frame.semantics: Explicit UR TCP offset is included; detailed gripper geometry and actuation are not modeled.

canonical_frame.name: parallel_jaw_pinch_tcp
canonical_frame.y_axis: finger opening/closing direction between left and right jaws
canonical_frame.z_axis: tool approach direction from palm/wrist toward the pinch point

tool_frame_mapping.rationale: The Robotiq 2F-85 pinch site uses +Z from gripper base to pinch center and +/-Y jaw symmetry, matching the canonical parallel-jaw axes after composition onto the UR5e attachment_site. The benchmark model remains tcp_offset_only.

excluded_rows.ur5e_true: attachment_site diagnostic, not a gripper TCP canonical frame
excluded_rows.*_proxy: simplified endpoints without concrete tool-frame axes
